'''koyadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:equicharacteristic|equicharacteristic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-y-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:equicharacteristic|equicharacteristic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| koyadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:koyadithi|koyadithi]] || [[word:koyadiji|koyadiji]] || [[word:koyadishi|koyadishi]] || [[word:koyadiki|koyadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:koyaduthuthu|koyaduthuthu]] || [[word:koyadujuju|koyadujuju]] || [[word:koyadushushu|koyadushushu]] || [[word:koyadukuku|koyadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:koyaduthu|koyaduthu]] || [[word:koyaduju|koyaduju]] || [[word:koyadushu|koyadushu]] || [[word:koyaduku|koyaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:koyadufthuf|koyadufthuf]] || [[word:koyadufjuf|koyadufjuf]] || [[word:koyadufshuf|koyadufshuf]] || [[word:koyadufkuf|koyadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:koyadethe|koyadethe]] || [[word:koyadeje|koyadeje]] || [[word:koyadeshe|koyadeshe]] || [[word:koyadeke|koyadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:koyadothotho|koyadothotho]] || [[word:koyadojojo|koyadojojo]] || [[word:koyadoshosho|koyadoshosho]] || [[word:koyadokoko|koyadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:koyadotho|koyadotho]] || [[word:koyadojo|koyadojo]] || [[word:koyadosho|koyadosho]] || [[word:koyadoko|koyadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:koyadofthof|koyadofthof]] || [[word:koyadofjof|koyadofjof]] || [[word:koyadofshof|koyadofshof]] || [[word:koyadofkof|koyadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfthÃŸf|koyadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfjÃŸf|koyadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfshÃŸf|koyadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfkÃŸf|koyadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|koyadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|koyadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|koyadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|koyadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfthÃŸf|koyadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfjÃŸf|koyadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfshÃŸf|koyadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfkÃŸf|koyadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfthÃŸf|koyadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfjÃŸf|koyadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfshÃŸf|koyadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:koyadÃŸfkÃŸf|koyadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:koyadÃḊthÃḊ|koyadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:koyadÃḊjÃḊ|koyadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:koyadÃḊshÃḊ|koyadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:koyadÃḊkÃḊ|koyadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:koyadathatha|koyadathatha]] || [[word:koyadajaja|koyadajaja]] || [[word:koyadashasha|koyadashasha]] || [[word:koyadakaka|koyadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:koyadatha|koyadatha]] || [[word:koyadaja|koyadaja]] || [[word:koyadasha|koyadasha]] || [[word:koyadaka|koyadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:koyadafthaf|koyadafthaf]] || [[word:koyadafjaf|koyadafjaf]] || [[word:koyadafshaf|koyadafshaf]] || [[word:koyadafkaf|koyadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:koyadasha|koyadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:koyadshÃḋasha|koyadshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koyadroasha|koyadroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:koyadmuasha|koyadmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:koyadyaasha|koyadyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokoyadnkshÃḋasha|gokoyadnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokoyadnkroasha|gokoyadnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokoyadnkmuasha|gokoyadnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokoyadnkyaasha|gokoyadnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:koyayadasha|koyayadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:koyayadshÃḋasha|koyayadshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koyayadroasha|koyayadroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:koyayadmuasha|koyayadmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:koyayadyaasha|koyayadyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokoyayadnkshÃḋasha|gokoyayadnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokoyayadnkroasha|gokoyayadnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokoyayadnkmuasha|gokoyayadnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokoyayadnkyaasha|gokoyayadnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:keyÃḊdasha|keyÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:keyÃḊdshÃḋasha|keyÃḊdshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:keyÃḊdroasha|keyÃḊdroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:keyÃḊdmuasha|keyÃḊdmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:keyÃḊdyaasha|keyÃḊdyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokeyÃḊdnkshÃḋasha|gokeyÃḊdnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokeyÃḊdnkroasha|gokeyÃḊdnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokeyÃḊdnkmuasha|gokeyÃḊdnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokeyÃḊdnkyaasha|gokeyÃḊdnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:koyfadasha|koyfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:koyfadshÃḋasha|koyfadshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koyfadroasha|koyfadroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:koyfadmuasha|koyfadmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:koyfadyaasha|koyfadyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokoyfadnkshÃḋasha|gokoyfadnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokoyfadnkroasha|gokoyfadnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokoyfadnkmuasha|gokoyfadnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokoyfadnkyaasha|gokoyfadnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
